title: Add "tags" based on a list of key words
excerpt: I need to link my daily work to annual objectives. I tried to use AI to add “tags” in a text column based on key words but can,t make it work. It would look like this - “If you find this word in task, look it up in this …

posts.author: gzevort1 (Toomuchtodo)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to link my daily work to annual objectives. I tried to use AI to add “tags” in a text column based on key words but can,t make it work. It would look like this - “If you find this word in task, look it up in this table and add the corresponding key word. Here is the table:

  • NXT => Migration

  • United View => Migration

  • Computer => Service to users

    ETc. ”

Thanks!
